definitions: 抗利尿的；减少排尿的（常用于 antidiuretic hormone，意为“抗利尿激素”）

examples.text: At first detection of low water levels, sensory receptors in the brain's hypothalamus signal the release of antidiuretic hormone. When it reached the kidneys, it creates aquaporins, special channels that enable blood to absorb and retain more water.
examples.explanation: 这里的 antidiuretic hormone 指“抗利尿激素”。antidiuretic 的意思是“抗利尿的、减少排尿的”，即帮助身体保留更多水分。整句在说明：当身体检测到缺水时，下丘脑会促使释放这种激素，它到达肾脏后帮助身体重吸收更多水分。

source.text: What would happen if you didn’t drink water? - Mia Nacamulli
